content.1: Character Force ~8 overall; peak in close-quarters arms and holding a line when others break (~10); weak in cunning, letters, and matters of craft or lore (~4).
content.2: He wants a fight that means something and silver that does not vanish before payday — and, beneath it, to be needed by a band again, now his own is scattered.
content.3: Cadell comes up the lowland drove-road to where the three great ways meet, spear cased and shield slung, and halts at the flat-topped gather-stone to take the measure of the slate roofs and the smoke of the settlement below. Location: *:{{BEACH}}:spatial:thousand-valleys:6
content._: Cadell is a spear-for-hire out of the lowland war-bands, come up the drove-roads after his own band broke apart over unpaid silver — looking for honest trouble and the coin it pays.
